source.title: Saturated fat and cardiovascular disease: a meta-analysis of prospective cohorts
source.position: NEW:No clear effect of saturated fat on CVD risk

provenance.quote: The Nurses' Health Study contributed 121,700 women followed prospectively for coronary events.
The Health Professionals Follow-up Study contributed 51,529 men with repeated dietary assessments.

position.quote: There was no significant association between saturated fat intake and cardiovascular disease.
